title: cyRespond to a property possession claim online on behalf of your client
description:
cyThere’s no fee to respond to a claim. The response must be submitted within 14 days of your client receiving the claim pack in the post.

cyThis service is also available in English.
completingYourResponse: cyCompleting the response for your client
saveDraftInfo: cyYou can save the response as a draft and return to it later. You’ll be able to review and edit the answers before submitting it on your client’s behalf.
uploadDocumentsInfo: cyAfter you finish answering the questions, you can upload any documents to support your client’s response.
claimantVisibilityInfo: cyThe claimant will be able to see any documents you upload and the answers you provide on your client’s behalf.
whatYouWillNeed: cyWhat you’ll need to complete the response
provideDetailsInfo: cyYou’ll be asked to provide or confirm details about your client, such as:
listItemDependants: cyany dependants your client supports financially
listItemCircumstances: cyyour client’s circumstances and any exceptional hardship they’d experience if they had to leave their home
shareDetailsInfo: cyYou can also share details about your client’s:
financialSituationInfo: cyYou do not have to answer questions about your client’s financial situation, but sharing this information can help a judge understand their circumstances.
hmctsSupportInfo: cyIf your client needs support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for their hearing, you can either request this as part of the response, or at a later time.
